# Dr. Data Decision Intelligence LLC

> Private, air-gapped AI systems for small businesses. Local-first decision intelligence built so client data never leaves the building.

Founder: Dr. Zubia Mughal, Ed.D. (known as Dr. Data). Based in Pewaukee, Wisconsin, serving the Milwaukee metro and Waukesha County.

## What we do

- Build private, local-first AI applications for professionals in regulated and confidentiality-bound fields, including functional medicine, coaching, real estate, physical therapy, and the construction trades.
- Turn the AI a business already pays for into AI that works for that business, without sacrificing privacy or control.
- Assess AI readiness using the STZ (Skill Threshold Zone) framework.

## Key pages

- Home: https://drdatadecisionintelligence.com/
- For small business: https://drdatadecisionintelligence.com/small-business
- Blog: https://drdatadecisionintelligence.com/blog
- Case studies: https://drdatadecisionintelligence.com/case-studies/milwaukee

## Contact

Book a call through the website to discuss private AI for your business.
